card.subtitle: PS C:\Users\ASUS KL codex Codex interactive mode (controlled) [Industrial Control] Interactive mode is controlled. [Industrial Control] Required behav...

article.body:
PS C:\Users\ASUS-KL> codex
Codex interactive mode (controlled)
[Industrial Control] Interactive mode is controlled.
[Industrial Control] Required behavior:
- treat interactive mode as discussion, triage, and light local guidance by default
- upgrade to explicit task mode for repo-changing implementation work
- read or expose secrets, tokens, cookies, passwords
╭──────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ >_ OpenAI Codex (v0.123.0-alpha.5)           │
│                                              │
│ model:       gpt-5.4 high   /model to change │
│ directory:   ~                               │
│ permissions: YOLO mode                       │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────╯

  Tip: New Build faster with Codex.

  • upgrade to explicit task mode for repo-changing implementation work

  • read or expose secrets, tokens, cookies, passwords ╭──────────────────────────────────────────────╮ │ >_ OpenAI Codex (v0.123.0-alpha.5) │ │ │ │ model: gpt-5.4 high /model to change │ │ directory: ~ │ │ permissions: YOLO mode │ ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────╯
